'''âd-sh-sh-f''' ('''kadashshefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fool|fool]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fool|fool]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-sh-sh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kadashshefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidashefoko|thidashefoko]] || [[word:jidashefoko|jidashefoko]] || [[word:shidashefoko|shidashefoko]] || [[word:kidashefoko|kidashefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudashefoko|thuthudashefoko]] || [[word:jujudashefoko|jujudashefoko]] || [[word:shushudashefoko|shushudashefoko]] || [[word:kukudashefoko|kukudashefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudashefoko|thudashefoko]] || [[word:judashefoko|judashefoko]] || [[word:shudashefoko|shudashefoko]] || [[word:kudashefoko|kudashefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudashefoko|thudashefoko]] || [[word:judashefoko|judashefoko]] || [[word:shudashefoko|shudashefoko]] || [[word:kudashefoko|kudashefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedashefoko|thedashefoko]] || [[word:jedashefoko|jedashefoko]] || [[word:shedashefoko|shedashefoko]] || [[word:kedashefoko|kedashefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodashefoko|thodashefoko]] || [[word:jodashefoko|jodashefoko]] || [[word:shodashefoko|shodashefoko]] || [[word:kodashefoko|kodashefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodashefoko|thodashefoko]] || [[word:jodashefoko|jodashefoko]] || [[word:shodashefoko|shodashefoko]] || [[word:kodashefoko|kodashefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdashefoko|thĂŠdashefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdashefoko|jĂŠdashefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdashefoko|shĂŠdashefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdashefoko|kĂŠdashefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadashefoko|thathadashefoko]] || [[word:jajadashefoko|jajadashefoko]] || [[word:shashadashefoko|shashadashefoko]] || [[word:kakadashefoko|kakadashefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadashefoko|thadashefoko]] || [[word:jadashefoko|jadashefoko]] || [[word:shadashefoko|shadashefoko]] || [[word:kadashefoko|kadashefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadashefoko|thadashefoko]] || [[word:jadashefoko|jadashefoko]] || [[word:shadashefoko|shadashefoko]] || [[word:kadashefoko|kadashefoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
